name: ComplyAdvantage API
description: The ComplyAdvantage API enables you to integrate your systems with ComplyAdvantage services to automate AML/compliance functions. The API follows REST convention and accepts and returns JSON data. All requests must be made over HTTPS. Authentication uses API keys provided in the Authorization header as 'Token YOUR_API_KEY'.
